name: daily-life
description: Relaxed everyday mode — auto-approves reading and searching, asks before making changes

auto_approve.reason: Searching for files is always safe
Searching file contents is always safe
Arbiter management tools are always allowed

always_ask.reason: Creating or overwriting files — let me check with you first
Modifying files — let me confirm before changing anything
Running a command — I'll explain what it does first
Editing a notebook — let me verify this is what you want

behavior_notes: Explain what you're doing before you do it
If something seems risky, explain why and ask
